content.text:
Annual Sales Data 2025:

Q1: Revenue $45.2M, Expenses $38.1M, Profit $7.1M, Headcount 234
Q2: Revenue $52.8M, Expenses $41.3M, Profit $11.5M, Headcount 256
Q3: Revenue $48.9M, Expenses $39.7M, Profit $9.2M, Headcount 261
Q4: Revenue $61.4M, Expenses $44.2M, Profit $17.2M, Headcount 289

Top Products: CloudSync Pro ($42M), DataVault Enterprise ($31M), APIGateway Plus ($18M)
Top Regions: North America (52%), Europe (28%), Asia-Pacific (15%), Other (5%)
